ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On An Accounting By Ms. Dolch Or A Waiver Of An Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avner Sofer for Tina Leakakos. Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Special Administrator).

Mr. Sofer stated that the $65,000.00 has already been paid out of Ms. Leakakos personal funds and that there was a presumption of undue influence. Mr. Der stated that Ms. Dolch did take control of the Bank of America account, and that she paid a few expenses (bond premium, fees for death certificates, notary fees) but that nothing else was paid out. In addition, Mr. Der stated that they don't anticipate that their fees will be very large and that they would like to petition for their fees to be paid now. Counsel are to talk about the issue of fees and whether an accounting will be needed or waived. The Court granted the Tina's Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived and the will is being admitted. Status on an accounting by Ms. Dolch or a waiver of an accounting was set for January 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.
